events.name: Cornhole @ Quayle’s Brewery
events.venue: Quayle’s Brewery\, 4567 12 Line N\, Coldwater\, Ontario\, L0K 1E0\, Canada
events.description:
Get ready to toss some bags and soak up summer nights at Quayle’s Brewery! Our Wednesday Night Cornhole League is the perfect mix of friendly competition and laid-back vibes. 
We’re running two 6-week sessions:
• June 3 – July 15
• July 22 – August 26 
Whether you join one session or both\, all
